title: Star Wars: Episode IV - A New Hope
description: A young farm boy discovers his destiny as a Jedi Knight when he joins forces with a rogueish pilot, two droids, and a wise old warrior to rescue a rebel princess from the clutches of the evil Galactic Empire and destroy their planet-destroying space station.

title: Star Wars: Episode V - The Empire Strikes Back
description: After the Rebel Alliance's devastating defeat at Hoth, Luke Skywalker travels to the swamp planet Dagobah to train with the legendary Jedi Master Yoda, while his friends are relentlessly pursued across the galaxy by Darth Vader and bounty hunter Boba Fett, leading to shocking revelations about Luke's past.

title: Star Trek: The Motion Picture
description: When a mysterious and powerful alien cloud threatens Earth, Admiral Kirk must reunite with his former crew aboard the refitted USS Enterprise to intercept the entity and discover its true intentions before it destroys all life on the planet.

title: Star Trek II: The Wrath of Khan
description: Admiral Kirk faces his most dangerous enemy yet when the genetically-engineered superman Khan Noonien Singh escapes exile and hijacks a Federation starship, seeking revenge against Kirk while threatening the galaxy with a terraforming weapon that doubles as the ultimate destructive force.

title: Pulp Fiction
description: In this non-linear crime anthology, two philosophical hitmen navigate Los Angeles's criminal underworld while their boss's wife overdoses, a boxer refuses to throw a fight, and a pair of armed robbers hold up a diner, with all stories intersecting in unexpected ways that explore themes of redemption and consequence.

title: Reservoir Dogs
description: After a jewelry heist goes catastrophically wrong, the surviving criminals retreat to their warehouse rendezvous point, where paranoia and suspicion tear the group apart as they try to identify the undercover cop in their midst through a series of violent flashbacks.

title: Fight Club
description: An insomniac office worker forms an underground fight club with a charismatic soap maker as a form of male therapy and rebellion against consumer culture, but the club evolves into something far more dangerous as the narrator's grip on reality begins to unravel.

title: The Matrix
description: A computer hacker discovers that reality as he knows it is actually a simulated world created by sentient machines to pacify humanity while using their bodies as an energy source, and he must choose between comfortable ignorance and dangerous truth as humanity's prophesied savior.

title: Ghostbusters
description: Three eccentric parapsychologists lose their university funding and establish a ghost removal service in New York City, where they must battle an ancient Sumerian god of destruction while dealing with skeptical customers, government bureaucracy, and an EPA agent determined to shut them down.

title: Ghostbusters II
description: Five years after saving New York, the disbanded Ghostbusters reunite when a river of psychoactive slime beneath the city threatens to unleash the spirit of a 16th-century tyrant on New Year's Eve, forcing them to harness the power of positive emotion to save the world again.

title: The Silence of the Lambs
description: A young FBI trainee must seek the advice of brilliant but insane cannibal psychiatrist Dr. Hannibal Lecter to catch another serial killer who skins his victims, engaging in a dangerous psychological game where she must reveal her deepest traumas to gain his insights.

title: Seven
description: A retiring detective and his idealistic rookie partner hunt a methodical serial killer who is murdering people based on the seven deadly sins, racing against time through a rain-soaked city to prevent the final murders while discovering the horrifying truth behind the killer's master plan.

title: Zodiac
description: A San Francisco political cartoonist becomes obsessed with tracking down the Zodiac Killer, a serial murderer who taunts police and media with cryptic letters and ciphers, spending decades pursuing leads that consume his personal life and sanity in the hunt for truth.

title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring
description: A young hobbit inherits a ring of ultimate power forged by the Dark Lord Sauron and must journey across Middle-earth with a fellowship of men, elves, dwarves, and hobbits to destroy it in the fires of Mount Doom before Sauron can reclaim it and enslave the world.

title: The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers
description: With the fellowship broken, Frodo and Sam continue their quest toward Mordor guided by the treacherous Gollum, while Aragorn, Legolas, and Gimli race to defend the kingdom of Rohan against Saruman's army of ten thousand Uruk-hai at the fortress of Helm's Deep.

title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey
description: Reluctant hobbit Bilbo Baggins is swept into an epic quest to reclaim the lost Dwarf Kingdom of Erebor from the fearsome dragon Smaug, joining thirteen dwarves led by the legendary warrior Thorin Oakenshield on a journey through Middle-earth filled with goblins, orcs, and wizards.

title: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone
description: An orphaned boy discovers on his eleventh birthday that he's a wizard and has been accepted to Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry, where he learns about his famous past, makes lifelong friends, and confronts the dark wizard who murdered his parents.

title: Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets
description: Harry returns to Hogwarts for his second year only to discover that students are being mysteriously petrified and that a legendary chamber has been opened, releasing a monster that only the heir of Slytherin can control, forcing Harry to uncover dark secrets about the school's past.

title: The Jungle Book
description: Raised by wolves in the Indian jungle, young Mowgli must leave his animal family when the fearsome tiger Shere Khan returns to the jungle, embarking on a journey to the man-village while his friends Baloo the bear and Bagheera the panther try to convince him to embrace human civilization.

title: The Lion King
description: A young lion prince flees his kingdom after his father's death, believing himself responsible for the tragedy, but must return years later to confront his murderous uncle and reclaim his rightful place as king with the help of his childhood friend and a wise mandrill.

title: Peter Pan
description: The Darling children are whisked away to the magical Neverland by the boy who never grows up, where they battle Captain Hook and his pirates, befriend the Lost Boys, and learn that childhood adventure comes at the cost of growing up and assuming adult responsibilities.

title: Inception
description: A skilled thief who steals corporate secrets through dream-sharing technology is offered a chance to have his criminal history erased if he can successfully plant an idea deep in a target's subconscious, a dangerous mission that blurs the line between dreams and reality across multiple layered dream states.

title: Interstellar
description: With Earth dying from crop blights and dust storms, a former NASA pilot leads a team of astronauts through a wormhole near Saturn to find a new home for humanity, confronting the mysteries of space-time, black holes, and the powerful force of love that transcends dimensions.

title: The Shawshank Redemption
description: Wrongly convicted banker Andy Dufresne forms an unlikely friendship with fellow lifer Red while serving time in Shawshank State Penitentiary, maintaining his innocence and hope over decades through quiet dignity, financial expertise, and an elaborate escape plan that takes years to execute.

title: The Godfather
description: The aging patriarch of an organized crime dynasty transfers control to his reluctant son Michael, who transforms from war hero to ruthless mob boss as he navigates family loyalty, business dealings, and the violent power struggles of post-war America's criminal underworld.

title: Goodfellas
description: A young man rises through the ranks of the Brooklyn mob from the 1950s through the 1980s, experiencing the glamorous lifestyle and brutal violence of organized crime before paranoia and drug addiction lead to his downfall and decision to become an FBI informant.

title: The Dark Knight
description: Batman faces his ultimate test when the psychotic Joker plunges Gotham City into chaos with a series of elaborate schemes designed to prove that even the noblest people can be corrupted, forcing the Caped Crusader to make impossible moral choices to save the city.

title: Batman Begins
description: After witnessing his parents' murder, billionaire Bruce Wayne trains with a secret society and returns to Gotham City to fight corruption as the masked vigilante Batman, confronting his childhood fears while battling a terrorist plot involving a fear-inducing toxin.

title: Alien
description: The crew of the commercial towing ship Nostromo encounters a derelict alien spacecraft on a distant planetoid, unwittingly bringing aboard a lethal extraterrestrial creature that stalks them one by one through the claustrophobic corridors of their ship in deep space.

title: Aliens
description: Ripley returns to the alien planet with a squad of Colonial Marines to investigate why contact was lost with a terraforming colony, only to discover hordes of the deadly creatures and a young girl who's the sole survivor, fighting for survival against overwhelming odds.

title: Blade Runner
description: In a dystopian 2019 Los Angeles, a burnt-out cop specializing in hunting down bioengineered humanoids called replicants must track down and retire four fugitive replicants who've returned to Earth seeking to extend their artificially limited lifespans, questioning what it means to be human.

title: Blade Runner 2049
description: Thirty years after the original events, a new blade runner discovers a long-buried secret that could plunge society into chaos, leading him on a quest to find Rick Deckard, who's been missing for decades, while questioning his own existence as a replicant.

title: Jurassic Park
description: A billionaire industrialist invites a team of scientists to preview his new dinosaur theme park on a remote island, but when a greedy programmer sabotages the park's security system, the genetically resurrected prehistoric creatures escape and hunt the visitors through the jungle.

title: Jaws
description: When a massive great white shark terrorizes a New England beach town during the lucrative summer season, the new police chief must overcome his fear of water and team up with a marine biologist and grizzled shark hunter to stop the predator before more lives are lost.

title: The Terminator
description: A cyborg assassin is sent back from a post-apocalyptic 2029 to 1984 Los Angeles to kill Sarah Connor, whose unborn son is destined to lead humanity's resistance against the machines, while a human soldier follows to protect her in a desperate race against time.

title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
description: A more advanced shapeshifting Terminator is sent back to kill the young John Connor, but the resistance reprograms the original Terminator to protect him and his mother Sarah, leading to a battle between machines to determine the fate of humanity's future.

title: Die Hard
description: An off-duty New York cop visits Los Angeles to reconcile with his estranged wife at her company's Christmas party, but when German terrorists take over the high-rise building, he becomes the only hope for the hostages as he wages a one-man war against the criminals.

title: Raiders of the Lost Ark
description: Adventurous archaeologist Indiana Jones races against Nazi agents across Egypt and Nepal to find the legendary Ark of the Covenant before Hitler can use its mystical powers to make his army invincible, battling snakes, ancient traps, and rival archaeologists.

title: Back to the Future
description: A teenager is accidentally sent thirty years into the past in a time-traveling DeLorean invented by his eccentric scientist friend, where he must ensure his teenage parents fall in love while finding a way to return to 1985 before he erases himself from existence.

title: Forrest Gump
description: A simple man with a low IQ but good intentions witnesses and unwittingly influences several defining historical events in 20th century America while pursuing his childhood sweetheart, proving that life is unpredictable and that being different isn't necessarily a disadvantage.

title: Schindler's List
description: German industrialist Oskar Schindler gradually transforms from a war profiteer into a savior of over a thousand Jewish lives during the Holocaust by employing them in his factories, spending his fortune to protect them from the Nazi death camps in occupied Poland.

title: Gladiator
description: A powerful Roman general is betrayed and reduced to slavery when the emperor's corrupt son murders his father and seizes the throne, forcing the general to become a gladiator and rise through the ranks of the arena to avenge his family and restore honor to Rome.
